name: AMERIGUARD SECURITY SERVICES, INC.
business: The Company provides armed and unarmed security guard services to federal, state, local governmental entities, quasi-governmental entities, and commercial property. It also provides non-emergency medical transportation services to the Veterans Administration.

exposures.sentence: Despite the advances in the U.S. contract guarding business over recent years, there remains a question as to the industry s viability in view of the increasing trend for integrating manned services with security systems (i.e. security video, access control and monitoring) along with the emergence of other new smart technology options and solutions (i.e. robotics, drones, cybersecurity and crowd sharing alert notification).

AGC has established a 24-hour dispatch department to monitor camera systems and direct patrolling officers to the problem locations.
Management is taking steps to increase revenue for our AGC subsidiary by focusing on our very successful combination of portable surveillance system, 24/7 monitoring and security guard response.
We have a Board of Directors with business development with specifically high tech and AI experience.

catalysts.sentence: There is a court date set in February 2027.
Both parties have agreed to a mediation, which is scheduled to occur in May 2026.

tamClaims.claim: North American non-emergency medical transportation market was $6.4 billion in 2022, growing at 7.5-9% CAGR.
tamClaims.sentence: A review of multiple publications available online indicates the North American market was approximately $6.4 billion in 2022 with a compound annual growth rate of between 7.5% and 9%.

tamClaims.claim: TUS addressable market of approximately $8.5 billion in 2026.
tamClaims.sentence: This provides TUS with a market of approximately $8.5 billion in 2026.
